sampleNotes:
Attendees: Alice (PM), Bob (Eng), Carol (Design)
- Bob reported backend API v2 is on track, will deploy Wed.
- Carol showed new onboarding mockups; team agreed to adopt option B.
- Decision: Freeze scope for v2.0 after this week.
- Risk: Mobile testing device shortage; Alice to order 2 more iPads by Friday.
- Action: Bob to finalise migration script by Tue EOD.
- Action: Carol to deliver final icons by Thu.
